problem id: e0d92248
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  01010101 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 00110000
  01100100 -> 00000000
  10101111 -> 01111000
  10011101 -> 11001001
  01011101 -> 11000000
  10100100 -> 00000000
  00111101 -> 11000000

query: 10001010
predicted answer: 00000000
